title: sutera major
intro: Sutera major, also known as Chrysanthemum morifolium, is a flowering plant native to Asia, commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe and protect the body. Sutera major has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and is also believed to have anti-aging and immune-boosting effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
